title: Build a real-time collaborative task board in Rust with axum WebSockets

steps.description:
Implement the full feature in src/main.rs — single-binary rust project

Feature requirements: Build a real-time collaborative task board in Rust with axum WebSockets, in-memory state, REST API for CRUD, and a live broadcast channel so all connected clients see updates instantly
steps.done_condition: src/main.rs compiles and fully implements: Build a real-time collaborative task board in Rust with axum WebSockets, in-memory state, REST API for CRUD, and a live broadcast channel so all connected clients see updates instantly; Cargo.toml has correct dependencies

mergeOrder: Merge P0, then P1, P2, P3, P4 in parallel, followed by P5, and finally P6.

riskRegister.mitigation: Implement a persistence mechanism if necessary.
riskRegister.risk: In-memory state may complicate persistence beyond application lifecycle.

riskRegister.mitigation: Evaluate connection handling and implement a scaling strategy.
riskRegister.risk: Potential scalability issues with WebSocket connections.

successCriteria: Users can create, read, update, and delete tasks in real-time.
All connected clients receive updates instantly.
